MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GLOBAL GAMING LEAGUE, INC., PROFESSIONAL INTERACTIVE ENTERTAINMENT, INC MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.
APPEARANCES: John M. Genga, Esq., 818-444-4510 of Genga & Associates, P.C. for Defendant and Moving Party; Evans S. Nadel, Esq., 415-434-1600 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. The Court's tentative ruling is to grant the motion for change of venue. If Court changes its mind, counsel will be requested to submit supplemental briefing, if not, Court will issue an order.(302/REQ/HE) Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
